description: Review contract for Rentars — allows tenants to submit on-chain reviews for users (owners/properties). Enforces rating 1–5, one review per reviewer per subject, unique IDs, and per-subject review indexes.

functions.name: submit_review
functions.description: Submit a review for a reviewee. Validates rating is 1–5 and that the reviewer has not already reviewed this reviewee. Returns the new review ID.

inputs.name: reviewer
inputs.description: The Stellar address submitting the review. Must authorize the call.

inputs.name: reviewee
inputs.description: The Stellar address being reviewed (owner or property representative).

inputs.name: rating
inputs.description: Rating value. Must be between 1 and 5 inclusive.

inputs.name: comment
inputs.description: Optional free-text comment. May be an empty string.

outputs.description: The newly created review ID (auto-incremented, starts at 1).

errors: Reviewer has already reviewed this user

functions.name: get_review
functions.description: Retrieve a review by its global ID.

functions.name: get_reviews_for_user
functions.description: Return all review IDs submitted for a given reviewee. Returns an empty list if the user has no reviews.

inputs.name: reviewee
inputs.description: The Stellar address whose reviews to retrieve.

outputs.description: Ordered list of review IDs for the reviewee, in submission order.

functions.name: get_reputation
functions.description: Return the average rating for a reviewee scaled by 100 to avoid floating-point arithmetic (e.g. 4.5 average → 450). Returns 0 if no reviews exist.

inputs.name: reviewee
inputs.description: The Stellar address whose reputation to compute.

outputs.description: Average rating × 100. Range: 0 (no reviews) to 500 (all 5-star reviews). Divide by 100 to get the decimal average.

functions.name: review_count
functions.description: Return the total number of reviews ever submitted.

outputs.description: Total reviews submitted since contract deployment.

reviewer.description: Stellar address that submitted the review.

timestamp.description: Ledger timestamp at submission time (Unix seconds).

storage_keys.Review(u64): Review — individual review record keyed by global review ID
storage_keys.ReviewCount: u64 — monotonic counter for review ID generation
storage_keys.UserReviews(Address): Vec<u64> — list of review IDs for a given reviewee address
storage_keys.HasReviewed(Address, Address): bool — duplicate-prevention flag keyed by (reviewer, reviewee) pair

notes: Review IDs are globally unique and auto-incremented starting at 1.
Each (reviewer, reviewee) pair may only have one review. Attempting a second submission panics.
The timestamp field is set from env.ledger().timestamp() at submission time.
A reviewer cannot review themselves (no explicit check, but the auth model requires the reviewer to sign).
